description: 自动化产线A EtherCAT 从站寄存器业务含义绑定模板。涵盖伺服驱动器、I/O模块、温控模块、视觉控制器的关键PDO寄存器映射。

registers.name: Control_Word
registers.description: DS402 控制字, 用于控制伺服状态机
registers.business_comment: X轴伺服使能控制位: bit0 SwitchOn, bit1 EnableVoltage, bit2 QuickStop, bit3 EnableOperation

registers.name: Target_Position
registers.description: 目标位置, 编码器计数单位
registers.business_comment: X轴目标位置指令, 1 count = 1微米, 行程范围 0 ~ 1200000

registers.name: Target_Velocity
registers.business_comment: X轴目标速度指令, 最大 3000 rpm

registers.name: Status_Word
registers.description: DS402 状态字, 反映伺服状态
registers.business_comment: X轴状态读取: bit5 Fault, bit10 TargetReached, bit11 InternalLimitActive

registers.name: Actual_Position
registers.business_comment: X轴实际位置, 用于闭环定位监控与报警检查

registers.name: Actual_Velocity
registers.business_comment: X轴实际速度, 用于速度环调节与抖动监控

registers.name: Actual_Torque
registers.business_comment: X轴电机负载, 持续>80%应检查机械磨损

registers.name: Control_Word
registers.business_comment: Y轴伺服使能控制位

registers.name: Target_Position
registers.description: 目标位置, 编码器计数单位
registers.business_comment: Y轴目标位置指令, 1 count = 1微米, 行程范围 0 ~ 800000

registers.name: Target_Velocity
registers.business_comment: Y轴目标速度指令

registers.name: Status_Word
registers.business_comment: Y轴状态读取

registers.name: Actual_Position
registers.business_comment: Y轴实际位置反馈

registers.name: Actual_Velocity
registers.business_comment: Y轴实际速度反馈

registers.name: Actual_Torque
registers.business_comment: Y轴电机负载

registers.name: Digital_Outputs
registers.business_comment: 传送带控制: bit0 主电机启动, bit1 副电机启动, bit8 红灯, bit9 黄灯, bit10 绿灯, bit16 气阀1, bit17 气阀2

registers.name: Digital_Inputs
registers.business_comment: 传送带传感器: bit0 启动按钮, bit1 停止按钮, bit2 急停, bit8 入口光电, bit9 出口光电, bit10 工件到位, bit16 气压正常

registers.name: Counter_Products
registers.business_comment: 当日已通过工件数量, 用于产量统计

registers.name: Setpoint_Zone1
registers.business_comment: 回流焊温区1设定, 正常 2500 (=250°C)

registers.name: Setpoint_Zone2
registers.business_comment: 回流焊温区2设定, 正常 2650 (=265°C)

registers.name: Setpoint_Zone3
registers.business_comment: 回流焊温区3设定, 正常 2550 (=255°C)

registers.name: Actual_Zone1
registers.business_comment: 温区1实际测温, 允许偏差±10°C, 超限报警

registers.name: Actual_Zone2
registers.business_comment: 温区2实际测温, 允许偏差±10°C

registers.name: Actual_Zone3
registers.business_comment: 温区3实际测温, 允许偏差±10°C

registers.name: Heater_Power_Percent
registers.business_comment: 加热模块当前输出功率, 长期100%提示加热器异常

registers.name: Inspect_Trigger
registers.business_comment: 上升沿触发一次视觉检测任务

registers.name: Recipe_ID
registers.business_comment: 当前选择的检测配方: 1=PCB-A, 2=PCB-B, 3=外壳装配

registers.name: Result_OK_NG
registers.business_comment: 最近一次检测结果: 0合格, 1不合格

registers.name: NG_Code
registers.business_comment: 不合格原因: 1=缺件, 2=错位, 3=极性反, 4=焊点不良, 5=外观划伤

registers.name: Score_Confidence
registers.business_comment: 算法匹配置信度, 低于 9500 需要人工复检
